threats.description: CVE-2026-25253 (CVSS 8.8): PromptArmor found that link preview features in Telegram/Discord can be turned into data exfiltration pathways when communicating with OpenClaw via indirect prompt injection. The agent constructs attacker-controlled URLs with dynamically generated query parameters containing sensitive data, exfiltrated automatically via link preview without user click. Over 40,214 exposed instances detected.
